def test_kheapsort_avoids_duplicate_processing():
    from source import kheapsort
    arr = [3, 2, 1, 5, 4]
    k = 2
    result = list(kheapsort(arr, k))
    expected = sorted(arr)
    assert result == expected, f"kheapsort should return sorted list {expected}, got {result}"
    assert len(result) == len(arr), f"Result length {len(result)} should match input length {len(arr)}"
